title: BioTelemetry - Remote Cardiac Monitoring
problem: Remote cardiac monitoring services are fragmented and lack integrated care pathways for timely clinical intervention.
solution: Comprehensive remote cardiac monitoring with devices, monitoring services, and AI-powered analytics for arrhythmia detection.
technology: Remote monitoring devices, AI arrhythmia detection, 24/7 monitoring centers, care coordination platform
regulatory_notes: FDA cleared devices and monitoring services
varden_fit: Moderate - Monitoring service with care coordination component. Creates continuous data flow for cardiology.
notes: Major player in remote cardiac monitoring. Integrated with Philips cardiology ecosystem.
